videos.title: Bible Study | Genesis 1:1–3 | By Semitic Jew
videos.description:
This Bible study examines Genesis 1:1–3 as the foundation for understanding creation, divine order, Scripture, and restoration.

The study begins with 2 Timothy 3:16–17, Matthew 19, and Matthew 22 to establish why all Scripture must be studied carefully and why Christ Himself pointed back to Genesis when addressing doctrine, law, and order.

This study covers:

- Genesis 1:1–3
- All Scripture as inspired by God
- Christ’s appeal to “the beginning”
- The Scriptures and the power of God
and more ... 

This lesson focuses on reading the text according to Scripture, not religious tradition, racial propaganda, or philosophical speculation.

Scripture. Logic. Truth.

Shalom.

#semiticjew #genesis #biblestudy #genesis1 #scripturelogictruth #israelites #creation #oldtestament #inthebginninggod

videos.title: Pride vs. Humility: Repentance and True Manhood #shorts
videos.description: Pride whispers defeat, making change feel like losing. True strength lies in a broken spirit and repentance – alignment with God, not weakness. See correction as mercy, not humiliation. #Pride #Humility #Repentance #Faith #SpiritualGrowth

videos.title: Truth Destroys False Innocence: Embrace Real Repentance #shorts
videos.description: We protect comforting myths about our nation, church, family, and politics. But truth doesn't preserve false innocence—it destroys it, paving the way for real repentance. #TruthRevealed #SelfReflection #Deception #Repentance #SocietalTruths

videos.title: Unlearning Oppression: Reclaiming Identity & Faith #shorts
videos.description: We've been taught to measure acceptability by proximity to those who miseducated us. Adopting their religion, structures, holidays, and political categories as our own, mistaking them for divine truth. #CulturalImposition #IdentityCrisis #HistoricalTrauma #SocialCommentary

videos.title: Capitalism vs. Scripture: A Critical Look #shorts
videos.description: Defending capitalism as scriptural? This perspective argues America cherry-picked verses, condoned slavery, and created an anti-biblical system. Is America Egypt or restoration? #Capitalism #ChristianValues #SocialJustice #BiblicalInterpretation

videos.title: Political Ideologies Defined #shorts
videos.description:
Democrats and Republicans both fall short of being the 'most high.' Liberalism isn't a path to eternal salvation, nor is conservativism.
#PoliticalPhilosophy #Ideologies #Philosophy #Civics

videos.title: Will You Choose Truth When It Costs You? #shorts
videos.description:
The ultimate test: choosing truth when it comes with a price. This message is for Black and Brown communities – will you stand for truth, even when it's costly?
#Truth #Justice #Community #Accountability #MoralDilemma

videos.title: The Bible's True Origins: Not European #shorts
videos.description:
Challenging the notion that the Bible is a 'white man's book.' Discover the non-European roots of prophets, apostles, and the Messiah, revealing a different narrative of sacred history.
#BiblicalHistory #AfricanOrigins #RacialReconstruction #AncientCultures

videos.title: Fear of People Over God's Command #shorts
videos.description:
Many fall not because they don't know God's word, but because they fear people's opinions more. Saul's confession reveals the spirit holding us back: 'I feared the people and obeyed their voice.'
#SpiritualWisdom #FaithOverFear #Obedience #Discernment

videos.title: The Lie of White Jesus and Capitalism #shorts
videos.description:
The deception of clinging to a white Jesus while upholding capitalism. Ignoring the Sabbath and mislabeling discipline. A call to question these ingrained falsehoods.
#WhiteJesus #Capitalism #Sabbath #Righteousness #Critique

videos.title: Belonging vs. Truth: What Truly Matters? #shorts
videos.description:
Does your sense of belonging depend on dishonesty? If so, it's not true fellowship, it's captivity. Prioritize truth over a false sense of connection.
#TruthMatters #Authenticity #Belonging #SelfReflection #InnerPeace
